import.fileTooBig: The file exceeds 50 MB. Verify that you exported the correct file from your portfolio app.
import.invalidXml: The file is not valid XML.
import.invalidFormat: Make sure you export from your portfolio app in XML format with ID attributes (not encrypted).
import.encrypted: The file appears to be encrypted. Re-export from your portfolio app choosing XML format with ID attributes.
import.conversionError: Error during conversion. The previous portfolio is intact.
import.importInProgress: Import already in progress. Wait for completion.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading the page.

mutation.genericFailure: Something went wrong. Please try again.

portfolio.duplicateName: A portfolio named “{{name}}” already exists. Choose a different name.

server.ACCOUNT_HAS_TRANSACTIONS: This account has transactions and cannot be deleted. Delete or move the transactions first.
server.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: The selected account no longer exists. Reload and try again.
server.ACCOUNT_NOT_PORTFOLIO: This operation is only available on securities accounts.
server.ACCOUNT_QUERY_FAILED: Could not read accounts from the backup file. It may be damaged or produced by a different version.
server.ACCOUNT_REFERENCED_BY_PORTFOLIO: This account is used as a portfolio's reference cash account and cannot be deleted. Change the portfolio's reference account first.
server.ALREADY_SETUP: This portfolio is already set up.
server.BACKUP_FAILED: Could not create the backup file. Please try again.
server.BENCHMARK_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can compare up to {{maxBenchmarks}} benchmarks at once. Remove one and try again.
server.CHART_CONFIG_NOT_FOUND: This chart is no longer available.
server.CONVERSION_FAILED: Conversion failed. Your existing portfolios are untouched.
server.CORRUPTED_FILE: The backup file is corrupted and cannot be restored.
server.DASHBOARD_NOT_FOUND: This dashboard is no longer available.
server.DEMO_PORTFOLIO_FETCH_BLOCKED: Price updates are disabled for the Demo portfolio. Import a real XML or create your own portfolio to update prices.
server.DEMO_PORTFOLIO_IMMUTABLE_METADATA: The Demo portfolio's settings cannot be changed. Create or import your own portfolio to customize it.
server.DEMO_SOURCE_MISSING: The Demo data is not installed on this copy of quovibe.
server.DUPLICATE_ISIN: A security with this ISIN already exists.
server.DUPLICATE_NAME: A portfolio with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
server.ENCRYPTED_FORMAT: The file appears to be encrypted. Re-export from Portfolio Performance choosing XML format with ID attributes.
server.FETCH_IN_PROGRESS: A price update is already running for this portfolio. Wait for it to finish and try again.
server.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file exceeds the upload size limit.
server.IMPORT_IN_PROGRESS: Another import is already running. Wait for it to finish and try again.
server.IMPORT_REQUIRES_FILE: Select a backup file to restore.
server.INVALID_ALLOCATION_VIEW: The allocation view settings are not valid.
server.INVALID_CHART_CONFIG: The chart configuration is not valid. Reset the chart to its default layout and try again.
server.INVALID_FILE_FORMAT: File type not supported. Upload a plain-text file with the expected extension.
server.INVALID_FORMAT: The XML is not a Portfolio Performance export (missing <client> root or ID attributes).
server.INVALID_INPUT: Invalid input. Check the fields and try again.
server.INVALID_PERIOD: The reporting period is not valid.
server.INVALID_SCHEMA: The backup file was produced by an incompatible version of quovibe.
server.INVALID_SECURITIES_ACCOUNT: The selected securities account is not valid for this portfolio.
server.INVALID_SOURCE: The portfolio source is not recognized.
server.INVALID_SQLITE: The file is not a valid quovibe backup.
server.INVALID_TABLE_LAYOUT: The table layout settings are not valid.
server.INVALID_XML: The file is not valid XML. Re-export from Portfolio Performance and try again.
server.MISSING_PORTFOLIO_NAME: The backup file does not contain a portfolio name.
server.MISSING_REQUIRED_TABLES: The backup file is missing required data and cannot be restored.
server.NO_REFERENCE_ACCOUNT: This portfolio has no linked cash account. Add one in portfolio settings first.
server.PERIOD_NOT_FOUND: This reporting period is no longer available.
server.SECURITY_ALREADY_IN_WATCHLIST: This security is already on the watchlist.
server.SECURITY_NO_FEED_CONFIGURED: This security has no price feed configured. Assign one in the security details to fetch prices.
server.SECURITY_NOT_FOUND: The selected security no longer exists. Reload and try again.
server.STREAM_FAILED: The download was interrupted. Please try again.
server.TAXONOMY_MOVE_AT_BOUNDARY: This item is already at the edge and cannot move further in that direction.
server.CATEGORY_MOVE_AT_BOUNDARY: This category is already at the edge of its siblings and cannot move further in that direction.
server.CATEGORY_NOT_IN_TAXONOMY: One of the selected categories does not belong to this taxonomy.
server.TEMP_FILE_EXPIRED: The upload expired. Start the import again.
server.FX_RATE_REQUIRED: An FX rate is required when source and destination currencies differ.
server.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_DESTINA: This transaction type is not allowed for the destination account.
server.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_SOURCE: This transaction type is not allowed for the selected account.
server.TRANSACTION_NOT_FOUND: This transaction no longer exists. It may have been deleted.
server.Validation error: Invalid input. Check the fields and try again.
server.security_has_transactions: Cannot delete — {{count}} transactions are linked to this security. Delete or reassign them first.
